messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-554 — EPIC — Root capability commands: specify/implement/qa/document/etc. as engine-level commands that work with or without a running swarm; do not promote directly; tracks children
What it solves: SUB-TRACKER, do not promote directly — coordinator promotes child slices.
If the human rules for reading (b), this epic's children must be
re-specced from scratch as a constitution amendment (Article 5 process)
before any implementation ticket, not amended in place.
Approval context: This intake asks for root-level commands (specify, implement, qa, document,
assimilate, review, harden, status, resume, stop, doctor) that "automatically
determine the most appropriate execution strategy: swarm execution when the
swarm is available, standalone execution when it is not" and states "…
BL-554 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-554" (or "reject BL-554 <reason>") to act.
